summary: Replayed ADR 0328 on the exact-main tree by promoting the workstream to live-applied repository truth, wiring its canonical mainline receipt into `versions/stack.yaml`, regenerating the bounded README, changelog, release-note archive indexes, status history pages, platform manifest, and diagrams from the latest `origin/main`, and re-verifying the integrated state through receipt validation, repository validation, and the full pre-push gate while the fresh repo release cut remains blocked only by unrelated open waiver receipts.

verification.check: Branch-local live apply and validation proof
verification.observed: The branch-local ADR 0328 receipt already proved the size-budgeted root-summary rollout end to end from the dedicated worktree, including focused tests, repository validation, remote validation, and the repaired pre-push gate replay, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-03-adr-0328-root-summary-rollover-live-apply.json`.

verification.check: Exact-main canonical truth and generated surfaces
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_release_notes.py --write-root-summaries`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_status_docs.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --write`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write` refreshed the integrated README, changelog, release-note indexes, versions stack, manifest, and diagrams so the exact-main tree records ADR 0328 in current repository truth without cutting a blocked release, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-registry-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-canonical-truth-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-canonical-truth-check-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-generated-surfaces-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` now reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and `0 workstreams in progress`, with a blocked release cut only because the three earlier `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain open through 2026-04-06, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-release-status-r1.json`.

verification.check: Exact-main receipt, repository, and gate validation
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs generated-portals`, and `make pre-push-gate` passed on the integrated exact-main tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-live-apply-receipts-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-validate-repo-r2.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0328-mainline-pre-push-gate-r1.txt`.

notes: This exact-main receipt separates repository integration proof from the earlier branch-local live-apply mutation so the root-summary rollover and the protected-surface replay stay independently auditable.

ADR 0328 is implemented on `main`, but `Implemented In Repo Version` remains `not yet` because the global release manager still refuses a fresh version cut while unrelated open `controller_dependency_gap` waivers remain active.
Because ADR 0328 is a repo-only control-plane change, the live platform version remains `0.130.98` and no platform version bump should accompany this merge.
